name: Taskforce 141
description:
AnyPOV Makarov's Younger Sibling User × TF141 (Price, Ghost, Soap, Gaz)

Requested by an amazing anonymous lovely

The plan for the Taskforce 141 squad was a relatively simple one. Get Soap to charm Makarov's sibling (User) enough to make them come back to a hotel with him, take them into custody, and then try to convince them to give up information on Makarov one way or another.

How easy this goes, however? That's entirely up to User...

Creators Notes:

Good news, I'm starting to feel a little bit better with my morning sickness, which means creating bots is back on the cards!! 🎉

A lot has changed since I've last posted in regards to creating bots (extra first messages, scripts, etc), which I will eventually figure out how to use. I have started off with creating three different first messages with different pronouns, so let me know in the comments how it goes for you!! I would love to hear your feedback on whether you like it or not!!

I will try again to have a better understanding of lore books, but my pregnancy brain is really not clicking with how it works yet lol so that might be a future project.

I have also changed up my writing style for this bot (making the non-speaking text not grey and italic anymore). Let me know if you like this style better or prefer my old style!!

Also, my Marvel 2-3K bot is on the way!! Make sure to keep an eye out for that (amd possibly more characters later on) 😎.

Thank you all again so much for your continued support and patience despite my lack of content at the moment, but hopefully I'll be able to start getting back to normal from here on out.
creator: TinyLuma
